question.text: Under REIT Regulations, each sponsor shall hold or propose at least what percentage of the number of units of the REIT on post-initial offer basis?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, each sponsor shall hold or propose at least 5% of the number of units of the REIT on post-initial offer basis. This is a per-sponsor requirement. **The Trap:** 15% is the collective holding requirement for sponsors and sponsor groups for the first 3 years, not the per-sponsor minimum. These are two different requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Each sponsor must individually hold at least 5% of post-offer units, while the collective sponsor group holding follows a decreasing schedule from 15% in the first 3 years.
